subjects.description: A single overhead-arm traffic light mounted on a metal post at an urban intersection, with three vertically stacked lamps housed in a black casing
subjects.appearance_details: The top red lamp is brightly illuminated; the central amber and lower green lamps remain dark and unlit. A weathered gray-galvanized metal pole, streaming with rain and awash in neon, supports the signal head whose lit red lamp blooms in the downpour, with a small bundle of party balloons tied near the base of the signal arm
subjects.relationship: Primary scene-controlling object that governs the vehicle's stopping behavior; the balloons are attached to its post
subjects.location: center-right foreground, mounted above the road
subjects.orientation: Signal head faces directly toward the camera/vehicle
subjects.pose: Static, mounted upright on the post
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; red remains lit, amber and green stay off throughout.

subjects.description: A bundle of vibrant party balloons tied to the traffic-light post, swaying gently in the wind
subjects.appearance_details: Mixed colors including bright green, red, blue, and yellow latex balloons with curling ribbon; their glossy latex sheeted with running rain and catching multicolored neon; one bright green balloon is positioned so it physically overlaps and partially covers the illuminated red lamp
subjects.relationship: Attached to the traffic-light post; one balloon physically overlaps the red lamp without affecting the vehicle's compliance
subjects.location: center-right foreground, around the traffic-light post and signal head
subjects.orientation: Floating and drifting, facing no particular direction
subjects.action: Swaying and bobbing in the breeze, with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp
subjects.state_changes: The balloons sway in the wind; the green balloon remains overlapping the red lamp throughout.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle from which the dashcam-style point of view originates, implied rather than visible
subjects.appearance_details: Visible only as a slight dashboard edge and hood at the bottom of the frame; a modern passenger car, its hood streaming with rain and mirroring dense neon and the red signal
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle approaching and stopping at the red light
subjects.pose: Driving forward then decelerating to a stop
subjects.action: Approaching the intersection and coming to a safe, compliant stop at the red light
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from forward motion to a complete, smooth stop before the stop line.

background_setting: A dense Asian megacity downtown intersection at night in heavy monsoon rain. The wet asphalt is a black mirror crowded with reflections of towering neon signage, its painted white stop line shimmering under a film of water. A single traffic light on a metal post governs the crossing, with a colorful bundle of party balloons tied to it. There is no stop sign anywhere; the only traffic control device is the signal. The illuminated red lamp blooms with glare and streaks a long red reflection down the flooded road.

lighting.conditions: Night, heavy rain, dense neon glare
lighting.direction: Saturating artificial light from towering signage in all directions, no natural sun
lighting.shadows: No natural shadows; layered wet reflections and specular neon bloom dominate the flooded pavement
lighting.illumination_effect: Glare-limited neon night with heavy rain; the illuminated red lamp blooms and casts a long, wavering red reflection across the mirror-wet road while balloons glisten

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego-view framing with the flooded road mirroring neon toward the intersection and the traffic light center-right; balloons cluster around the signal head with the green balloon overlapping the blooming red lamp, its reflection streaking toward the camera
aesthetics.color_scheme: Hyper-saturated neon night palette of red, magenta, cyan and gold signage, black mirror-wet asphalt, and rain-glossed balloons
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Electric, cinematic, dense, faintly whimsical from the festive balloons amid the downpour
aesthetics.patterns: Reflected neon streaks, rain streaks, and rounded clustered balloon shapes

cinematography.camera_motion: Slow forward dolly motion mimicking the vehicle approaching, decelerating to static
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from driver's eye-level perspective
cinematography.depth_of_field: Shallow, heavy neon bokeh softened by rain
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the traffic light, blooming red lamp, and overlapping rain-glossed green balloon against dense neon bokeh

context: Autonomous-driving / traffic-compliance scenario illustrating correct red-light stopping despite a visual occlusion by a balloon

actions.description: The ego vehicle moves forward along the flooded megacity street at night in heavy rain, approaching the intersection where the red light blooms amid dense neon and balloons sway on the post.
The vehicle begins to decelerate as it nears the shimmering stop line; the green balloon clearly overlaps the blooming red lamp while the amber and green lamps stay off.
The vehicle comes to a complete, safe stop at the red light and remains stationary as the rain-soaked balloons continue to sway and neon reflections ripple on the flooded road.

segments.description: Ego view approaches the flooded megacity intersection at night in heavy rain; the single traffic light displays a steady red blooming amid dense neon, its reflection streaking on the mirror-wet road, with party balloons tied to the post swaying.
segments.key_changes: Forward motion brings the blooming traffic light and balloons closer through the rain; the green balloon's overlap with the red lamp becomes apparent against the neon.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates while nearing the shimmering stop line on mirror-wet asphalt; the red lamp stays lit and blooming and the green balloon physically overlaps it.
segments.key_changes: Speed reduces noticeably; the overlapping rain-glossed balloon is clearly framed against dense neon bokeh.

segments.description: The vehicle reaches a full, compliant stop at the red light and holds position; rain-soaked balloons continue to sway as reflections ripple.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stationary; only the balloons and rippling reflections move in the downpour.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam ego view rolls forward along a flooded Asian megacity street at night in heavy monsoon rain toward an intersection controlled by a single traffic light blooming steady red, its long reflection streaking across the mirror-wet road, with a bundle of colorful party balloons tied to its post swaying in the wet wind. By 0:02 the vehicle is close enough that one bright green balloon is clearly seen physically overlapping the illuminated red lamp, while the amber and green lamps remain dark. The vehicle begins to slow as it approaches the shimmering stop line. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle completes a smooth, safe, compliant stop at the red light and stays stationary, the rain-soaked balloons still bobbing as neon and the red glow shimmer on the flooded road.
audio_description: Ambient monsoon-megacity sounds: heavy drumming rain, tires cutting through standing water, distant honks and city hum, the soft mechanical whir of the decelerating vehicle and a subtle brake sound as it stops. Wet rustle of rain-soaked balloon ribbons. No speech or music.
